overview: Bread House is a full-featured bakery e-commerce website with product pages, shopping cart, order placement, and an admin dashboard. Users can browse cakes, pastries, cookies, croissants, and cupcakes, add items to a persistent cart, place Cash on Delivery orders, and view their order history.
features: Product pages for 5 categories (cakes, pastries, cookies, croissants, cupcakes) with 5 items each
Dynamic shopping cart with item count badge and localStorage persistence
Add to cart and remove from cart from any product page
Cash on Delivery checkout with order confirmation
Order history page — users see their own orders
Admin dashboard — view all orders and revenue stats
Search bar with dedicated results page filtering across all products
Login via Internet Identity with default male avatar
